events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is a **thermal growth compensation failure** — the shaft alignment was set cold without building in API 686-style thermal growth offsets, so the train is now misaligned under actual hot operating conditions. Marked `fail` / `high` risk given the in-service state, with corrective actions centered on a hot/running alignment check and recalculated cold targets.
